name: twitter-mission-console
description: Fetch and display X (Twitter) profile metrics and Cloudflare campaign dashboard data

scripts.d1:migrate: wrangler d1 execute twitter_metrics --remote --command "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS twitter_metrics (date TEXT PRIMARY KEY, following INTEGER NOT NULL, followers INTEGER NOT NULL);"
scripts.d1:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute twitter_metrics --local --command "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS twitter_metrics (date TEXT PRIMARY KEY, following INTEGER NOT NULL, followers INTEGER NOT NULL);"
